response.justification: While this candidate is a highly capable software engineer with strong fundamentals and communication skills, they fall dramatically short on the mandatory technical requirements. With only ~6 months of professional C++ experience against a 5-10 year requirement, no Windows platform background, and zero capital markets or fixed income domain expertise, they are fundamentally misaligned with this role. Their recent career has been focused on web development and JavaScript/TypeScript, not the systems-level financial software development this position demands.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to rapidly master multiple programming languages and technical domains across diverse industries
Strong software engineering fundamentals with hands-on CI/CD, DevOps, and infrastructure expertise
Excellent communication and mentoring abilities evidenced by workshops, public speaking, and senior-level positions
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 year requirement
No experience with Windows platform development or capital markets/fixed income systems
Recent career trajectory is entirely focused on web development and JavaScript/TypeScript, not systems programming

key_factors.factor: C++ experience gap (6 months vs 5-10 years required)
No capital markets or fixed income domain expertise
Strong general software engineering fundamentals and learning ability
